properties.Project_Title: Mindanao Transport Connectivity Improvement Project
properties.Project_Description: The Mindanao Transport Connectivity Improvement Project (MTCIP) is a proposed project, for financing by the World Bank, in support to the Department’s goal in the improvement of road transport network in Mindanao. The proposed Project intends to support (a) climate resiliency, road safety improvement followed by maintenance of the Cagayan De Oro (CDO) – Davao – General Santos (GenSan) corridor and (b) upgrading of three (3) local road sections connected to the CDO-Davao-GenSan main corridor.
properties.Location: Cagayan de Oro to General Santos City Via Davao City Corridor
properties.Province: Misamis Oriental, Bukidnon, Davao del Norte, Davao del Sur, South Cotabato, Sarangani
properties.Update:

properties.Project_Title: Zamboanga-Basilan Power Integration (submarine cable)
properties.Project_Description:
The Zamboanga-Basilan Interconnection Project aims to provide reliable supply of electricity necessary to realize the full development potential of the island.
The project involves the installation of Pitogo S/S - Pitogo CTS 69kV single circuit transmission line, Pitogo CTS - Baluno CTS 1 - 300mm.sq. submarine cables and construction of a new Isabela 69kV switchyard. The power requirement of Basilan is being served by NPC-SPUG through missionary electrification. NPC-SPUG utilizes Basilan Diesel Power Plant and Power Barge 119. The Zamboanga – Basilan interconnection is envisioned to give the province a reliable and efficient power service. Also, this project counts out Basilan from the subsidy recipients of Universal Charge – Missionary Electrification.
- Power summit in Zamboanga City
- SPUG Basilan
- Zamboanga-Basilan Interconnection is already included in NGCP’s Transmission Development Project for 2026-2030 and is up for filing at the ERC. It remains to be confirmed whether an FS has already been completed by the NGCP

properties.Project_Title: Zamboanga - Basilan Interlink Bridge Project
properties.Project_Description:
The project includes a 53.03km-long, four-lane, cable-stayed bridge that will cross Zamboanga City to Basilan Island.  The Zamboanga-Basilan Interlink Bridge project includes theconstruction of two cabled-stayed navigation bridges.  The structure will have main span of 00 meters and 900 meters, respectively.  The marine bridges will stand in water as deep as 50m.  The Bridge will also introduce new expansion and economic growth oppurtunities outside Zamboanga City, such as developing seaports in Basilan as major shipping portals to the Philippines, reduced transportation costs, improve accessibility, and enhance the tourism industry in the region.

Four lane cable stayed bridge, 53 kilometers

> Engineering Design 5.4B
> Constructon Cost 289B

properties.Project_Title: Central Mindanao High Standard Highway Construction Project
properties.Project_Description: 64.7 km Cagayan De Oro-Malaybalay Section is a four-lane new highway (HSH Class 1) which involves the construction of a high pier and steel bridge with a length of 358m and 500m respectively. The project is located at the Municipality of Tagoloan and Cagayan de Oro City, Misamis Oriental, Municipality of Manolo Fortich, Sumilao, Impasug-ong and Malaybalay City in Region X.

properties.Project_Title: Butuan City - Agusan del Norte Logistical Highway
properties.Project_Description: The project will be a major thoroughfare that provides a safe and easy access road that will also serve as a vital link for the economic activities that would connect the agricultural economic zone to the potential industrial zones in the province. It involves 33.82 kilometers to be constructed for 6-Lanes, including the construction and widening of the eleven bridges, the provision of slope protection structures and facilities, and road safety devices

properties.Project_Title: Iligan City Coastal Bypass Road
properties.Project_Description: The Coastal Road Project is a 4-Lane road infrastructure initiative set to commence at Barangay Santa Felomina and end at Brgy. Tominobo Proper of Iligan City. This strategic roadway aims to alleviate traffic congestion along the Misamis Oriental-Ma Cristina Boundary Road, particularly within the city proper. Encompassing a total estimated length of 6.50 km, this project is poised to enhance connectivity, streamline transportation, and contribute to the overall development of the region.

properties.Project_Title: Samar and Agusan Daang Maharlika Road Improvement Project
properties.Project_Description:
A total of 338.66 km total road length of Daang Maharlika Road will be rehabilitated.

Samar Section: Widening and road improvement of 202.24 km. (Samar 1st – 93.42 km; Samar 2nd – 108.82 km) Daang Maharlika segment in Samar including improvement of 71 bridges. The project starts at Calbayod, Samar and ends at the proposed 2nd Juanico Bridge traversing 16 cities and municipalities.

Agusan Section: Widening and road improvement of 136.42 km. Daang Maharlika segment in Agusan del Sur. The project starts at the Municipality of Sibagat and ends at the Municipality of Trento, Agusan del Sur traversing 7 cities and municipalities.

properties.Project_Description: The Puntian-Arakan Road is a 23.6-kilometer infrastructure development in Mindanao, Philippines, designed to improve connectivity between Bukidnon and North Cotabato. This road aims to enhance regional accessibility, benefiting local communities by facilitating smoother travel and boosting economic activities in the region.
